mapper.insert: insert into tbl_notification (member_id, sender_id, noti_type, target_type, target_id, message) values (#{memberId}, #{senderId}, #{notiType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{message})
mapper.select: select n.id, n.sender_id, m.nickname as sender_nickname, m.profile_image as sender_profile_image, n.noti_type, n.target_type, n.target_id, n.message, n.is_read, n.created_datetime from tbl_notification n left join tbl_member m on n.sender_id = m.id where n.member_id = #{memberId} order by n.created_datetime desc
